display.label: converter.type
display.description: How this converter will be used.

display.label: Enable Schemas
display.description: Include schemas within each of the serialized values and keys. Default: true

display.label: Schema Cache Size
display.description: The maximum number of schemas that can be cached in this converter instance. Default: 1000

display.label: Decimal Format
display.description: Controls which format this converter will serialize decimals in. This value is case insensitive and can be either 'BASE64' (default) or 'NUMERIC' Default: BASE64

display.label: Replace null with default
display.description: Whether to replace fields that have a default value and that are null to the default value. When set to true, the Default: true
